properties.Text:
COMBAT ARENA COMMANDS:
/ready /r - Allows match to start
/leave /l - Leave the current arena
/settings /s - Change settings of arena [MUST OWN ARENA]
/forcestart /fs - Forces match to start [MUST OWN ARENA]
properties.Name: CommandList

properties.Text: THIS ARENA IS PRIVATED WITH A PASSWORD. PLEASE ENTER IT TO JOIN:
properties.Name: Detail

properties.Text: YOU ARE THE ARENA OWNER - TYPE /settings FOR CONFIGS
properties.Name: IsOwner

properties.Text: Number of Selected Cover Given Per Player (MIN 0, MAX 10):
properties.Name: DetailWall

properties.Text: Set arena to public in order to change the password.
properties.Name: PasswordExtra

properties.Text:
CREATIVE SERVER COMMANDS:
/autoupgrade /au - Sets autoupgrading to specified material [1-5]
/buildloadout /bl - Change your loadout to specified index [1-3]
/autolock /al - Autolocks placed benches with specified code
/leave /l - Leave the current arena
/settings /s - Change settings of arena [MUST OWN ARENA]`
/cost - Displays full material cost of arena builds
properties.Name: CommandList

properties.Text: THIS ARENA IS PRIVATED WITH A PASSWORD. PLEASE ENTER IT TO JOIN:
properties.Name: Detail

properties.Text: Set arena to public in order to change the password.
properties.Name: PasswordExtra
